name: The Adventures of Tree
short_description: The Adventures of Tree takes you on an open-ended adventure to save your species from the evil invaders; Florps! Explore the vast open world to discover its many secrets while completing quests, enjoying quirky dialogue, and upgrading your abilities and gear along the way.
detailed_description:
The Adventures of Tree takes you on an open-ended adventure to save your fellow species from the evil invaders; Florps!

Throughout this cute and charming hand-drawn game, you will have to make choices that will impact your story and eventual game ending while being free to roam the open world and vast landscapes, searching for epic treasures, and fighting all sorts of different creatures and bosses along the way!

Keep yourself laughing as you interact with the quirky and comical dialogue while completing a massive variety of different quests and missions to guide your way.

With countless hours of gameplay, huge replayability, and over 100 different achievements, this is not a game you want to miss out on!
